mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, remark, pay_time, delivery_time, receive_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from ws_order where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select from ws_order where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update ws_order set status = 5 where id = #{id} and status in (1, 2, 3)
